creator: mph@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: analyzed->closed

As discussed in email, I've committed this port with minimal testing 
on the assumption that with so many people already using and interested 
in the port, it is generally sound and any minor problems will be 
sorted out without much trouble. 

For your heroic effort to produce this beast, you have been added to 
the Handbook.  Is this really your first port?
